violations.description: Nonfood-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not designed and/or constructed to allow easy cleaning and to facilitate maintenance. - Door handle on refrigerator broken.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface * was not cleaned adequately. - Cabinet faces require more frequent cleaning.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)* were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. - Ceiling vent above microwave dusty. - Floors and walls could use a deep cleaning.
Lighting. — --Existing light fixtures * did not provide adequate illumination. - 2 lights in kitchen broken. - light cover over food prep broken.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
